tavily.answer: In 2025, the number of internal displacements caused by conflict or violence reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to a report by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. In Morocco, authorities identified 2.3 million aid recipient households for workforce integration, aiming to transition them from public aid to employment and income-generating activities. Meanwhile, Morocco has invested $17.1 billion in advanced technology and a domestic defense industry through joint ventures with Israeli firms, prompting Algeria to spend $25 billion to counter these advancements.
